description: Filipino American street gang based in Southern California, founded in 1972. Believed to be the oldest Filipino-American street gang in Los Angeles. Involved in gang violence, murder, drug trafficking, and theft. Active across multiple California counties and the Philippines.

country_links.evidence_quote: and have reached other states on the east coast like New Jersey and New York , and the Philippines .
country_links.context: The Satanas gang has expanded its presence to the Philippines.
